text:
At the Home tab: 

> Unable to load applications
> 
> Please verify Internet connectivity

At the Settings tab: nothing.

Maybe relevant, three errors when Discover starts. All the same: 

> The name org.freedesktop.PackageKit was not provided by any .service files
